narrative:
Johnstown C (precinct in Licking County) has 1,350 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points.
